description:
Goal:
Create the contribution-friendly broker registry layer before real automation.

Scope:
- adapters/_schema/
- adapters/_template/
- YAML schema
- registry loader
- registry validation command
- sample placeholder broker configs

Acceptance:
- Valid broker YAML loads.
- Invalid broker YAML fails with clear errors.
- Broker URLs are registry-controlled.
- Registry entries can mark adapter type: config_form, scripted, email_only, manual_only.
- Includes fields for difficulty, region, rescan_days, official_url, opt_out_url, status language, and safety flags.
title: Implement broker registry schema and loader
